# 1.7 Prompt Chain Base Traits

Part of [Component 1 — repcheck-shared-models](../01-SHARED-MODELS.md)

## Classes (all new)

| Class/Trait | Type | Fields/Methods |
|-------------|------|----------------|
| `PromptStage` | Enum | System, Persona, Lens, Context, Guardrails, Output, Custom |
| `InstructionBlock` | Case class | name: String, stage: PromptStage, weight: Double (0.0-1.0), version: String, content: String |
| `StageConfig` | Case class | stage: PromptStage, blockNames: List[String], weight: Double |
| `PromptProfile` | Case class | name: String, chain: List[StageConfig] |
| `ChainAssembler` | Trait | `assemble(profile: PromptProfile, blocks: Map[String, InstructionBlock], context: Map[String, String]): Either[String, String]` |
| `WeightTranslator` | Object | `translate(weight: Double, content: String): String` — wraps content with emphasis markers based on weight |

## Acceptance Criteria — 1.7 Prompt Chain Base Traits

**Functional:**
1. `PromptStage` enum: System, Persona, Lens, Context, Guardrails, Output, Custom with Circe codec and `fromString` parser
2. `InstructionBlock` has Circe codecs for GCS YAML/JSON block files
3. `PromptProfile` has Circe codecs for GCS profile definitions
4. `ChainAssembler.assemble` orders stages: System > Persona > Lens > Context > Custom > Guardrails > Output
5. `ChainAssembler.assemble` applies `WeightTranslator` to each block before concatenation
6. `ChainAssembler.assemble` merges multiple blocks within same stage into single section
7. `ChainAssembler.assemble` injects context values into Context stage by replacing `{{placeholder}}` tokens
8. `ChainAssembler.assemble` returns `Left` if referenced block name not found
9. `WeightTranslator` rules: 1.0 = "You MUST...", 0.7-0.9 = standard framing, 0.3-0.6 = "When possible..." advisory, <0.3 = soft suggestion

**Error Handling:**
10. `ChainAssembler.assemble` returns `Left` with all missing block names listed
11. `InstructionBlock` decoder rejects weight outside 0.0-1.0

**Test Requirements:**
12. Unit test: assemble profile with one block per stage, verify correct ordering
13. Unit test: assemble profile with multiple Lens blocks, verify co-location in Lens section
14. Unit test: missing block reference returns `Left` with block name
15. Unit test: context injection replaces `{{bill_text}}` placeholder
16. Unit test: `WeightTranslator` — weight 1.0 wraps "You MUST", 0.5 wraps "When possible", 0.2 wraps soft suggestion
17. Round-trip codec tests for `InstructionBlock` and `PromptProfile`
